payload.answer: Compiled durable memory cards for Sam’s recent employment change, music listening preference shift, and an upcoming AI infrastructure catch-up with an article to be sent.

entity_resolution.reason: Transcript names are present without prior identifiers; create new entities for Sam and Daniele and link to organizations/topics.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam is listening to Bill Evans, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele and Sam plan to catch up about AI infra, and Sam will send the requested article.

details: Employment: stored Sam left Goldman and joined Point72 (last month).
Music: stored Sam listens to Bill Evans and lately prefers early Coltrane.
Task: stored plan to catch up about AI infra and Sam will send the article.

repair_options: If a specific date/timeframe is required beyond 'last month,' ask for clarification.
If 'early Coltrane' should be tied to a specific album/era, request the exact reference.
If the article needs identification (title/link), ask for it.
